## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (zero warnings)
- [ ] `npm run test:run` passes
- [ ] No `console.log` left in production code
- [ ] No hardcoded IDs, API keys, or personal data
- [ ] New Firebase Firestore reads/writes go through a service, not directly from a component
